name: ARP Spoofing Attack
description: Detects ARP spoofing attempts indicating man-in-the-middle attacks
query:
// ARP Spoofing Detection (NDR)
// Multiple MAC addresses claiming same IP
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "arp"
  and operation = "reply"
group by source_ip
having count(distinct source_mac) > 1
within 300 seconds
